Localization.Description: KAV antivirus as part of SafeMobile Monitor detected an application or file that can be a threat

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: KAV antivirus as part of SafeMobile Monitor on device {datafield3} (SN: {datafield4}, IMEI: {datafield1}, UDID: {datafield2}, OS: {datafield6} {datafield5}) of user {subject.account.fullname} detected file {object.fullpath} that can be threat {datafield9} {object.process.name}
